plan.failureSummary: The deterministic page.ai cache attempted to interact with a 'Select your occupation' combobox, which does not exist on the current version of the dynamic survey page (Set 1 contains 'Age Group' instead), resulting in a selector resolution failure.
observedIndicators: Selector './/button[normalize-space(.)=\'Select your occupation\']' failed to resolve
Failure screenshot shows 'Set 1' containing 'Age Group' instead of an occupation selector
Historical run pattern shows alternating successes and quick failures, typical of dynamic page variations invalidating cached steps
The semantic intent of the AI prompt ('Fill out the all of the survey questions...') is highly flexible and can easily adapt on retry if cache is cleared

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and re-run automation
remediationSteps.details: Clear the Page AI cache and retry the test execution. This forces the agent to run autonomously and adapt to the current layout/questions instead of using the stale/mismatched cache.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable deterministic/cached mode for this test case
remediationSteps.details: Since this survey application is dynamically changing by design, disable deterministic caching/runMode for this specific test so that page.ai always evaluates the form fields autonomously on every execution.

plan.notes: The 'unstable-survey' application serves dynamic sets of questions (as indicated by 'Set 1' and 'unstable-survey' name). Running in DETERMINISTIC mode forces the test to replay cached steps from previous sets, causing it to fail when a different form layout loads. Clearing the cache allows the autonomous agent to dynamically adapt to the currently visible questions. For a permanent fix, deterministic mode/caching should be disabled for this test.
